name: Bausch & Lomb Corp
business: Bausch + Lomb is a fully integrated eye health company with a portfolio of approximately 400 products including contact lenses, intraocular lenses, surgical systems, vitamins, lens care products, prescription eye medications, and consumer products. It operates globally with a presence in approximately 100 countries and approximately 13,000 employees.

exposures.sentence: Our Surgical segment consists of medical device equipment, consumables and technologies for the treatment of cataracts, corneal, vitreous and retinal eye conditions, which includes IOLs and delivery systems, phacoemulsification equipment and other surgical instruments and devices necessary for ophthalmic surgery.

Our Pharmaceuticals segment consists of a broad line of proprietary and generic pharmaceutical products for post-operative treatments and treatments for a number of eye conditions, such as glaucoma, eye inflammation, ocular hypertension, dry eyes and retinal diseases.

Trukera Medical, a U.S.-based privately held ophthalmic medical diagnostic company, commercializes ScoutPro , a point-of-care portable device for precisely measuring osmolarity, the salt content of a person’s tears.

Our consumer eye care business consists of contact lens care products, OTC eye drops that address various conditions, including eye allergies, conjunctivitis, dry eye and redness relief, and eye vitamin and mineral supplements.
Several laws have been enacted at the U.S. state level that regulate the development and deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) platforms and systems.

catalysts.event: Launch of PreserVision AREDS 3 next-generation eye vitamin formulation
catalysts.sentence: PreserVision AREDS 3, a next-generation eye vitamin formulation, is anticipated to launch in 2026.

catalysts.event: NDA submission for Lumify Luxe (Lumify next generation)
catalysts.sentence: In addition, the Company is in the process of initiating a Lumify next generation ("Lumify Luxe") clinical study, for which a Phase 3 study met all primary and secondary endpoints and for which a NDA submission is anticipated during the first-half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Launch of Blink Triple Care Preservative Free Lubricating Eye Drops
catalysts.sentence: We are in the process of a preservative-free lipid-based formulation of our Blink Triple Care product, which is anticipated to launch in 2026.

catalysts.event: Launch of enVista Beyond EDOF intraocular lens in the U.S.
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate launching enVista Beyond TM EDOF in the U.S. in 2027.

catalysts.event: U.S. submission of ELIOS minimally invasive glaucoma surgery procedure
catalysts.sentence: The U.S. submission of this product is anticipated in the first-half of 2026.

catalysts.event: CE Mark and 510k submission for SeeLyra femtosecond laser cataract surgery system
catalysts.sentence: CE Mark and 510k submission is anticipated in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Approvals for SeeLyra femtosecond laser cataract surgery system
catalysts.sentence: CE Mark and 510k submission is anticipated in the first half of 2026 and approvals are anticipated by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Year 1 interim report for Myopia control contact lens study
catalysts.sentence: We expect to receive a year 1 interim report during 2026.
